name: Disclosure (Show/Hide)
description: A button that controls the visibility of a section of content; toggling it shows or hides the associated content.

keyboard_interactions.action: Toggles the visibility of the disclosure content
Toggles the visibility of the disclosure content

roles.description: Identifies the control element as a button (not needed on native <button>)

required_attributes.description: true when content is visible; false when hidden

optional_attributes.description: References the ID of the content element that is shown or hidden

notes: The disclosure pattern is simpler than accordion — use it for standalone show/hide controls
